9:00AM DEPT 3, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DEFT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. CAUSE SUBMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
